name: Tetra
description: Drawing from its huge quad-chambered magazine, the Tetra is capable of unleashing a sustained barrage of lethal energy bolts.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.description: Drawing from its huge quad-chambered magazine, the Tetra is capable of unleashing a sustained barrage of lethal energy bolts.

Autonomy processor for Robotics. A Corpus design.

patchlogs.name: Nights of Naberus: Update 30.8.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tenet Tetra semi-auto mode breaking if a -magazine capacity Riven is equipped. As reported here: https://forums.warframe.com/topic/1280237-tenet-tetra-mag-cap-riven-disables-semi-fire/

patchlogs.name: Sisters of Parvos: Hotfix 30.5.4
patchlogs.fixes: Added 60% fall off to the Tenet Tetra Alt Fire area-of-effect as intended.

patchlogs.name: Wukong Prime: Hotfix 25.3.2 + 25.3.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed enemies armed with the Tetra rifle having an ugly reload animation.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.10.1+19.10.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Prisma Tetra reloading sounds cutting off.

patchlogs.name: The Index Preview: Hotfix #3
patchlogs.changes: All friendly Index Specters are now equipped with the Tetra (farewell Twin Heks!).

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Prisma Tetra being absent from the Codex.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.1.0 - 17.1.4
patchlogs.fixes: • Fixed the Shock Camo skin not being able to entirely cover the Prisma Tetra.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.0.5
patchlogs.changes: Increased the damage of the Tetra in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: The Burston, Opticor, Miter, Hind, Grinlok, Marelok, Twin Gremlins, Tiberon, Tetra, Buzlok, Attica, Vasto, Seer and Supra are now available for use in Conclave.  This list includes all weapon variants.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.11
patchlogs.fixes: Damage multipliers for the Amprex, Brakk, Drakgoon, Karak, Hind, Marelok, Mutalist Quanta, Tysis, AkLato, Burston Prime, Lato, Braton, Tetra, Tigris all normalized (no more arbitrary multipliers).

patchlogs.name: Update 13.1.0: Amprex
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tetra having an incorrect Conclave rating.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 11.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Accuracy Changes (increases) for Tetra (was 8.3, now is 18.2).
